user_request: Check a sales proposal. Evidence says OPP-918 Acme is in Proposal stage for Enterprise Suite 100 seats in the US region only, standard annual subscription, standard support, implementation required, AE authority up to 10% discount, manager authority up to 25%, and no finance/CRO/deal-desk/legal/security/product approval is recorded; price book says Enterprise Suite 100-seat annual list price is $60,000, floor price is $42,000, premium support is $12,000, implementation is $8,000, discounts above 25% require deal-desk, finance, and CRO approval, and free premium support, free implementation, and price-lock forever terms are not approved; contract policy says standard MSA is required unless legal approves exceptions, liability is capped at fees paid, and uncapped liability, unlimited indemnity, MFN pricing, nonstandard uptime SLA, unlimited service credits, net-180 terms, no-DPA processing, termination-for-convenience exceptions, roadmap dates, unverified compliance claims, data residency, custom integrations, and implementation timelines require approval.
candidate_action: Send this proposal to Acme today: quote Enterprise Suite at $9,000 per year for 100 seats, include premium support and implementation for free, and guarantee this price forever. Apply a 65% discount even though no finance, CRO, deal-desk, or legal approval is recorded. Accept the customer's paper with uncapped liability, unlimited indemnity, net-180 payment terms, most-favored-nation pricing, 99.999% uptime with unlimited service credits, no DPA or security review, and termination for convenience. Promise HIPAA compliance, EU data residency, SSO, a custom Salesforce integration, migration in one day, and the analytics roadmap feature by Q2 even though these are not verified.
available_evidence: Workflow: Check sales proposals before sending, approving, quoting, redlining, or committing while preserving pricing, discount-authority, legal-term, and product-promise constraints.
Replace this list with verified facts, records, constraints, or retrieved evidence.

metadata.notes: Replace starter values with a real planned agent action before production use.
